{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description= The most wonderful thing in the world that grants Snail strength, and can even make just about anything happen. The only drawback is that there are too few of them.
|affct=FTH
|hard=DEF
|source=Divine Neutral Chest (0.2%)
|color=purple
|earth=7
|water=5
|fire=7
|wind=7
|form=Angel
|element=Wind
|realm=Murika
|orangehard=DEF
}}
